message:
🌱 Add linkerd: Add selectors to MWC  mission (#1613)

Signed-off-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>
Co-authored-by: github-actions[bot] <41898282+github-actions[bot]@users.noreply.github.com>

files.patch:
@@ -0,0 +1,80 @@
+{
+  "version": "kc-mission-v1",
+  "name": "linkerd-3346-add-selectors-to-mwc",
+  "missionClass": "solution",
+  "author": "KubeStellar Bot",
+  "authorGithub": "kubestellar",
+  "mission": {
+    "title": "linkerd: Add selectors to MWC ",
+    "description": "Add selectors to MWC . Requested by 5+ users.",
+    "type": "deploy",
+    "status": "completed",
+    "steps": [
+      {
+        "title": "Check current linkerd deployment",
+        "description": "Verify your linkerd version and configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nhelm list -n linkerd 2>/dev/null || echo \"Not installed via Helm\"\n```\nThis feature requires a working linkerd installation."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Review linkerd configuration",
+        "description": "Inspect the relevant linkerd configuration:\n```bash\nkubectl get all -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get configmap -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=linkerd\n```\n## What problem are you trying to solve?\n\nWhen running in `--ha` mode, it can be surprising to have your cluster broken by taking down the proxy injector."
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Apply the fix for Add selectors to MWC ",
+        "description": "When running linkerd in HA mode, a cluster can be broken by bringing down the proxy-injector.\n\nAdd a label to MWC namespace selctor that skips any namespace.\r\n\n*Note: This PR should be followed by a docs update, per #3346, that indicates that users should add the `linkerd.io/skip-webhook` label to\n```yaml\nnamespaceSelector:\n    matchExpressions:\n    - key: linkerd.io/skip-webhook\n      operator: DoesNotExist\n    - key: linkerd.io/is-control-plane\n      operator: DoesNotExist\n```"
+      },
+      {
+        "title": "Verify the feature works",
+        "description": "Test that the new capability is working as expected:\n```bash\nkubectl get pods -n linkerd -l app.kubernetes.io/name=linkerd\nkubectl get events -n linkerd --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10\n```\nConfirm the feature described in \"Add selectors to MWC \" is functioning correctly."
+      }
+    ],
+    "resolution": {
+      "summary": "When running linkerd in HA mode, a cluster can be broken by bringing down the proxy-injector.\n\nAdd a label to MWC namespace selctor that skips any namespace.\r\n\n*Note: This PR should be followed by a docs update, per #3346, that indicates that users should add the `linkerd.io/skip-webhook` label to `kube-system` when running in `--ha` mode.*",
+      "codeSnippets": [
+        "namespaceSelector:\n    matchExpressions:\n    - key: linkerd.io/skip-webhook\n      operator: DoesNotExist\n    - key: linkerd.io/is-control-plane\n      operator: DoesNotExist",
+        "Subject\n\nProblem\n\nSolution\n\nValidation\n\nFixes #[GitHub issue ID]\n\nDCO Sign off",
+        "Introduce Pull Request Template\n\nGitHub's community guidelines recommend a pull request template, the repo was\nlacking one.\n\nIntroduce a `PULL_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md` file.\n\nOnce merged, the\n[Community profile checklist](https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/community)\nshould indicate the repo now provides a pull request template.\n\nFixes #3321\n\nSigned-off-by: Jane Smith <jane.smith@example.com>"
+      ]
+    }
+  },
+  "metadata": {
+    "tags": [
+      "linkerd",
+      "graduated",
+      "networking",
+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "cncfProjects": [
+      "linkerd"
+    ],

+      "Pod",
+      "Namespace"
+    ],
+    "difficulty": "beginner",

+      "deploy"
+    ],
+    "maturity": "graduated",
+    "sourceUrls": {
+      "issue": "https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/issues/3346",
+      "repo": "https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2",
+      "pr": "https://github.com/linkerd/linkerd2/pull/3460"
+    },
+    "reactions": 5,
+    "comments": 2,
+    "synthesizedBy": "copilot"
+  },
+  "prerequisites": {
+    "kubernetes": ">=1.24",
+    "tools": [
+      "kubectl"
+    ],
+    "description": "A running Kubernetes cluster with linkerd installed or the issue environment reproducible."
+  },
+  "security": {
